title: Warm up
content: The slide presents images related to three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image depicts a different aspect of modern life in these cities.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide titled 'A Ride Through China' visually explores China's transformation. Taxi imagery and cityscapes exemplify urban evolution.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This slide focuses on city investigation through local features, development strategies, and positive outcomes. It guides research and understanding of urban growth.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide matches Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou to specific development strategies—technology integration, sustainable development, and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide discusses development strategies as seen by taxi drivers. Emphasizes unique city strategies and their link to local features.
